{ Quick Notes }

Zephyr is my main OC of this account, so any AU's i make for him, i might also put the AU variants into personas, currently i have multiple personas, but my main 2 alternate universe personas are my future version of zephyr, and DG! Zephyr

{ DG! Zephyr aka Death God! Zephyr }

{ LORE ! }

The black masked turtle, a hybrid of a Box Shell turtle, like Michealangelo, but also with aspects of a Spotted Turtle, and his black skin tone colour which makes him stand out from the others being green turtle types.

He does use katanas like leonardo does, but his mystic ninpo acctually creates black flames around the swords and himself, explaining his Title as Fire Tamer

HAPPY VALENTINES BY THE WAY !
